case_title: WESLEY CHAMBERS VS. EMERALD AUTO REPAIR

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-24-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-07-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WESLEY CHAMBERS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EMERALD AUTO REPAIR IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCES
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY CHAMBERS, WESLEY AS TO DEFENDANT EMERALD AUTO REPAIR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-24-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
